! Hermetic e2e fixture (tests/e2e/blocking.spec.ts). The tracker port
! placeholder is substituted at test time. One network rule, one cosmetic rule,
! and one scriptlet rule (+js resolves against the bundled uBO resources.json —
! the same data-driven mechanism that blocks same-origin YouTube ads; ADR 0013).
|http://127.0.0.1:TRACKER_PORT^
localhost##.ad-box
localhost##+js(set-constant, __amnesicScriptletProof, true)
